sections.paragraph:
ῥαβιθα. In Mk 5:41 codex D reads ραββι θαβιτα; this is meant for ῥαβιθά, the fem. of râbiâ girl; accordingly ῥ.=ταλιθά, which is read by the majority of witnesses.—Wlh. ad loc.; FSchulthess, ZNW 21, 1922, 243 note; TRE III 609.

fem. fem. = feminine

Wlh. Wlh. = JWellhausen, Einleitung—List 6

ad loc. ad loc. = ad locum (to or at the place under consideration)

ZNW ZNW = Zeitschrift für die ntl. Wissenschaft—List 6

TRE TRE = Theologische Realenzyklopädie—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 902
